verses.latin_vulgate: Exspectans exspectavi Dominum,  et intendit mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קַוֺּ֣ה קִוִּ֣יתִי יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיֵּ֥ט אֵ֝לַ֗י וַיִּשְׁמַ֥ע שַׁוְעָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: With expectation I have waited for the Lord, and he was attentive to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi, edelläveisaajalle. (H40:2) Minä hartaasti odotin Herraa: ja hän kallisti itsensä minun tyköni, ja hän kuuli minun huutoni.
verses.king_james: I waited patiently for the Lord; and he inclined unto me, and heard my cry.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et exaudivit preces meas,  et eduxit me de lacu miseriæ et de luto fæcis.  Et statuit super petram pedes meos,  et direxit gressus meos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲלֵ֤נִי ׀ מִבּ֥וֹר שָׁאוֹן֮ מִטִּ֢יט הַיָּ֫וֵ֥ן וַיָּ֖קֶם עַל־סֶ֥לַע רַגְלַ֗י כּוֹנֵ֥ן אֲשֻׁרָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he heard my prayers, and brought me out of the pit of misery and the mire of dregs. And he set my feet upon a rock, and directed my steps.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän veti minun ylös hirmuisesta haudasta ja sontaisesta loasta, ja asetti minun jalkani kalliolle, ja hallitsi minun käymiseni.
verses.king_james: He brought me up also out of an horrible pit, out of the miry clay, and set my feet upon a rock, and established my goings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et immisit in os meum canticum novum,  carmen Deo nostro.  Videbunt multi, et timebunt,  et sperabunt in Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֬ן בְּפִ֨י ׀ שִׁ֥יר חָדָשׁ֮ תְּהִלָּ֢ה לֵאלֹ֫הֵ֥ינוּ יִרְא֣וּ רַבִּ֣ים וְיִירָ֑אוּ וְ֝יִבְטְח֗וּ בַּיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he put a new canticle into my mouth, a song to our God. Many shall see, and shall fear: and they shall hope in the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän antoi minun suuhuni uuden veisun, kiittämään meidän Jumalaamme. Sen pitää monen näkemän, ja pelkäämän Herraa, ja toivoman häneen.
verses.king_james: And he hath put a new song in my mouth, even praise unto our God: many shall see it, and fear, and shall trust in the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus vir cujus est nomen Domini spes ejus,  et non respexit in vanitates et insanias falsas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֥שְֽׁרֵי־הַגֶּ֗בֶר אֲשֶׁר־שָׂ֣ם יְ֭הֹוָה מִבְטַח֑וֹ וְֽלֹא־פָנָ֥ה אֶל־רְ֝הָבִ֗ים וְשָׂטֵ֥י כָזָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the man whose trust is in the name of the Lord; and who hath not had regard to vanities, and lying follies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on se ihminen, joka panee uskalluksensa Herraan, ja ei käänny ylpeiden tykö ja niiden, jotka valheella vaeltavat.
verses.king_james: Blessed is that man that maketh the Lord his trust, and respecteth not the proud, nor such as turn aside to lies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multa fecisti tu, Domine Deus meus, mirabilia tua ;  et cogitationibus tuis non est qui similis sit tibi.  Annuntiavi et locutus sum :  multiplicati sunt super numerum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַבּ֤וֹת עָשִׂ֨יתָ ׀ אַתָּ֤ה ׀ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהַי֮ נִ֥פְלְאֹתֶ֥יךָ וּמַחְשְׁבֹתֶ֗יךָ אֵ֫לֵ֥ינוּ אֵ֤ין ׀ עֲרֹ֬ךְ אֵלֶ֗יךָ אַגִּ֥ידָה וַאֲדַבֵּ֑רָה עָ֝צְמ֗וּ מִסַּפֵּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast multiplied thy wonderful works, O Lord my God: and in thy thoughts there is no one like to thee. I have declared and I have spoken they are multiplied above number.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, minun Jumalani, suuret ovat sinun ihmees ja ajatukses, jotka sinä meille osoitat: ei ole mitään sinun vertaas; minä ilmoitan niitä ja sanon, vaikka ne ovat epälukuiset.
verses.king_james: Many, O Lord my God, are thy wonderful works which thou hast done, and thy thoughts which are to us-ward: they cannot be reckoned up in order unto thee: if I would declare and speak of them, they are more than can be numbered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacrificium et oblationem noluisti ;  aures autem perfecisti mihi.  Holocaustum et pro peccato non postulasti ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֤בַח וּמִנְחָ֨ה ׀ לֹֽא־חָפַ֗צְתָּ אׇ֭זְנַיִם כָּרִ֣יתָ לִּ֑י עוֹלָ֥ה וַ֝חֲטָאָ֗ה לֹ֣א שָׁאָֽלְתָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sacrifice and oblation thou didst not desire; but thou hast pierced ears for me. Burnt offering and sin offering thou didst not require:
verses.finnish_biblia: Uhri ja ruokauhri ei sinulle kelpaa, vaan korvat sinä minulle avasit: et sinä tahdo polttouhria eli syntiuhria.
verses.king_james: Sacrifice and offering thou didst not desire; mine ears hast thou opened: burnt offering and sin offering hast thou not required.

verses.latin_vulgate: tunc dixi : Ecce venio.  In capite libri scriptum est de me,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֣ז אָ֭מַרְתִּי הִנֵּה־בָ֑אתִי בִּמְגִלַּת־סֵ֝֗פֶר כָּת֥וּב עָלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then said I, Behold I come. In the head of the book it is written of me
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin minä sanoin: katso, minä tulen: Raamatussa on minusta kirjoitettu.
verses.king_james: Then said I, Lo, I come: in the volume of the book it is written of me,

verses.latin_vulgate: ut facerem voluntatem tuam.  Deus meus, volui,  et legem tuam in medio cordis mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַ֥עֲשׂוֹת־רְצוֹנְךָ֣ אֱלֹהַ֣י חָפָ֑צְתִּי וְ֝ת֥וֹרָתְךָ֗ בְּת֣וֹךְ מֵעָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: That I should do thy will: O my God, I have desired it, and thy law in the midst of my heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun tahtos, minun Jumalani, teen minä mielelläni; ja sinun lakis on minun sydämessäni.
verses.king_james: I delight to do thy will, O my God: yea, thy law is within my heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Annuntiavi justitiam tuam in ecclesia magna ;  ecce labia mea non prohibebo : Domine, tu scisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשַּׂ֤רְתִּי צֶ֨דֶק ׀ בְּקָ֘הָ֤ל רָ֗ב הִנֵּ֣ה שְׂ֭פָתַי לֹ֣א אֶכְלָ֑א יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה אַתָּ֥ה יָדָֽעְתָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have declared thy justice in a great church, lo, I will not restrain my lips: O Lord, thou knowest it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä saarnaan sinun vanhurskauttas suuressa seurakunnassa: katso, en minä anna tukita suutani; Herra, sinä sen tiedät.
verses.king_james: I have preached righteousness in the great congregation: lo, I have not refrained my lips, O Lord, thou knowest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justitiam tuam non abscondi in corde meo ;  veritatem tuam et salutare tuum dixi ;  non abscondi misericordiam tuam et veritatem tuam a concilio multo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צִדְקָתְךָ֬ לֹֽא־כִסִּ֨יתִי ׀ בְּת֬וֹךְ לִבִּ֗י אֱמוּנָתְךָ֣ וּתְשׁוּעָתְךָ֣ אָמָ֑רְתִּי לֹא־כִחַ֥דְתִּי חַסְדְּךָ֥ וַ֝אֲמִתְּךָ֗ לְקָהָ֥ל רָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have not hid thy justice within my heart: I have declared thy truth and thy salvation. I have not concealed thy mercy and thy truth from a great council.
verses.finnish_biblia: En minä salaa vanhurskauttas sydämessäni: minä puhun sinun totuudestas ja autuudestas: en minä peitä laupiuttas ja vakuuttas suuressa seurakunnassa.
verses.king_james: I have not hid thy righteousness within my heart; I have declared thy faithfulness and thy salvation: I have not concealed thy lovingkindness and thy truth from the great congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem, Domine, ne longe facias miserationes tuas a me ;  misericordia tua et veritas tua semper susceperunt me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֤ה יְהֹוָ֗ה לֹֽא־תִכְלָ֣א רַחֲמֶ֣יךָ מִמֶּ֑נִּי חַסְדְּךָ֥ וַ֝אֲמִתְּךָ֗ תָּמִ֥יד יִצְּרֽוּנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Withhold not thou, O Lord, thy tender mercies from me: thy mercy and thy truth have always upheld me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinä, Herra, älä käännä laupiuttas minusta pois: sinun laupiutes ja vakuutes aina minua varjelkoon.
verses.king_james: Withhold not thou thy tender mercies from me, O Lord: let thy lovingkindness and thy truth continually preserve me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam circumdederunt me mala quorum non est numerus ;  comprehenderunt me iniquitates meæ, et non potui ut viderem.  Multiplicatæ sunt super capillos capitis mei,  et cor meum dereliquit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י אָפְפֽוּ־עָלַ֨י ׀ רָע֡וֹת עַד־אֵ֬ין מִסְפָּ֗ר הִשִּׂיג֣וּנִי עֲ֭וֺנֹתַי וְלֹא־יָכֹ֣לְתִּי לִרְא֑וֹת עָצְמ֥וּ מִשַּׂעֲר֥וֹת רֹ֝אשִׁ֗י וְלִבִּ֥י עֲזָבָֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For evils without number have surrounded me; my iniquities have overtaken me, and I was not able to see. They are multiplied above the hairs of my head: and my heart hath forsaken me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä lukemattomat vaivat ovat minun piirittäneet: minun syntini ovat minun ottaneet kiinni, niin etten minä nähdä taida: ne ovat usiammat kuin hiukset päässäni, ja minun sydämeni on minussa vaipunut.
verses.king_james: For innumerable evils have compassed me about: mine iniquities have taken hold upon me, so that I am not able to look up; they are more than the hairs of mine head: therefore my heart faileth me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Complaceat tibi, Domine, ut eruas me ;  Domine, ad adjuvandum me respice.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְצֵ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה לְהַצִּילֵ֑נִי יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה לְעֶזְרָ֥תִי חֽוּשָׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Be pleased, O Lord, to deliver me. Look down, O Lord, to help me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kelvatkoon se sinulle, Herra, ettäs minun vapahdat: riennä, Herra, minua auttamaan!
verses.king_james: Be pleased, O Lord, to deliver me: O Lord, make haste to help me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confundantur et revereantur simul,  qui quærunt animam meam ut auferant eam ;  convertantur retrorsum et revereantur,  qui volunt mihi mala.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵ֘בֹ֤שׁוּ וְיַחְפְּר֨וּ ׀ יַחַד֮ מְבַקְשֵׁ֥י נַפְשִׁ֗י לִסְפּ֫וֹתָ֥הּ יִסֹּ֣גוּ אָ֭חוֹר וְיִכָּלְמ֑וּ חֲ֝פֵצֵ֗י רָעָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let them be confounded and ashamed together, that seek after my soul to take it away. Let them be turned backward and be ashamed that desire evils to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hävetköön ja kaikki pilkaksi tulkoon, jotka minun sieluani väijyvät hukataksensa sitä: palatkoon takaperin ja häpiään tulkoon, jotka minulle pahaa suovat.
verses.king_james: Let them be ashamed and confounded together that seek after my soul to destroy it; let them be driven backward and put to shame that wish me evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ferant confestim confusionem suam,  qui dicunt mihi : Euge, euge !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֭שֹׁמּוּ עַל־עֵ֣קֶב בׇּשְׁתָּ֑ם הָאֹמְרִ֥ים לִ֝֗י הֶ֘אָ֥ח ׀ הֶאָֽח׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let them immediately bear their confusion, that say to me: 'Tis well, 'tis well.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hämmästyköön häpiässänsä, jotka minulle sanovat: niin, niin.
verses.king_james: Let them be desolate for a reward of their shame that say unto me, Aha, aha.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsultent et lætentur super te omnes quærentes te ;  et dicant semper : Magnificetur Dominus, qui diligunt salutare tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֘שִׂ֤ישׂוּ וְיִשְׂמְח֨וּ ׀ בְּךָ֗ כׇּֽל־מְבַ֫קְשֶׁ֥יךָ יֹאמְר֣וּ תָ֭מִיד יִגְדַּ֣ל יְהֹוָ֑ה אֹ֝הֲבֵ֗י תְּשׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let all that seek thee rejoice and be glad in thee: and let such as love thy salvation say always: The Lord be magnified.
verses.finnish_biblia: Iloitkaan ja riemuitkaan kaikki sinussa, jotka sinua etsivät, ja jotka sinun autuuttas rakastavat, sanokaan aina: Herra olkoon korkiasti ylistetty!
verses.king_james: Let all those that seek thee rejoice and be glad in thee: let such as love thy salvation say continually, The Lord be magnified.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem mendicus sum et pauper ;  Dominus sollicitus est mei.  Adjutor meus et protector meus tu es ;  Deus meus, ne tardaveris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְיוֹן֮ אֲדֹנָ֢י יַחֲשׇׁ֫ב־לִ֥י עֶזְרָתִ֣י וּמְפַלְטִ֣י אַ֑תָּה אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י אַל־תְּאַחַֽר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But I am a beggar and poor: the Lord is careful for me. Thou art my helper and my protector: O my God, be not slack.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen köyhä ja vaivainen, mutta Herra pitää minusta murheen: sinä olet minun auttajani ja vapahtajani: minun Jumalani, älä viivy.
verses.king_james: But I am poor and needy; yet the Lord thinketh upon me: thou art my help and my deliverer; make no tarrying, O my God.
